_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in explaining AI concepts and terminology.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in building and presenting AI proof-of-concept demonstrations to executive audiences, communicating capability, limitations, and path to production.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AI domain. AI-S-019 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-K-012 (AG, cosine: 0.652), OP-S-004 (OP, cosine: 0.633).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.4/10 (raw 0.641). Shared vocabulary: [ai, skill]. DCWF-only terms [concepts, explaining, terminology] vs WIDAI-only terms [audiences, building, capability, communicating, concept, demonstrations] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.895 (P=0.922, R=0.870). P exceeds R by 0.052 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Skill in explaining AI concepts and terminology." and "Skill in building and presenting AI proof-of-concept demonstrations to executive" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.660 ≈ STS 0.641 (gap 0.019). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [ai, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 19.1%. Shared tokens: [ai, skill]. DCWF-only: [concepts, explaining, terminology]. WIDAI-only: [audiences, building, capability, communicating, concept, demonstrations].
